subject: First Year Algebra
instructions: Answer 4 questions. You should indicate which 4 problems you wish to be graded. Write your solutions clearly in complete English sentences. You may quote theorems (within reason) as long as you state them clearly.

problems.text: Prove that there exist at least three nonisomorphic nonabelian groups of order 12.
Prove that for \(n \geq 3\) the alternating group \(A_n\) is generated by 3-cycles. (You may assume that \(S_n\) is generated by transpositions.)
Let \(p\) be a prime, and let \(G=\operatorname{GL}(3,\mathbb{F}_p)\), where \(\mathbb{F}_p\) denotes the field of \(p\) elements.

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text:
Let
\[
U=\left\{\begin{pmatrix}1&a&b\\0&1&c\\0&0&1\end{pmatrix}\;\middle|\;a,b,c\in\mathbb{F}_p\right\}.
\]
Prove that \(U\) is a Sylow \(p\)-subgroup of \(G\).

problems.text: Let \(G\) be a group acting on a set \(X\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: For \(x\in X\), define the orbit of \(x\) and the stabilizer of \(x\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Assume that \(G\) is finite. Prove that the size of the orbit of \(x\) divides the order of \(G\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Define the terms automorphism of \(G\), inner automorphism of \(G\) and characteristic subgroup of \(G\).

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Prove that the set of automorphisms of \(G\) is a group in which the subset of inner automorphisms forms a normal subgroup.

subparts.label: (c)
subparts.text: Prove that if \(N\) is a normal subgroup of \(G\) and \(H\) is a characteristic subgroup of \(N\), then \(H\) is normal in \(G\).

problems.text: Let \(G\) be a group of order \(675=3^3 5^2\).

subparts.label: (a)
subparts.text: Prove that \(G\) has a normal Sylow 5-subgroup.

subparts.label: (b)
subparts.text: Prove that \(G\) has an element of order 15.
